---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Roadmaped
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Is it related to something you're
frustrated with?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. Note
that any nontrivial feature will need a spec in `docs/specs/` before
implementation — see `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
